name: Silver A Brady Contractor
districts_or_customers: Likely Laguna-Acoma area / Bureau of Indian Education or Laguna Department of Education routes (unconfirmed); not appearing on NM PED 2020 contractor list publicly accessible
recent_news: No M&A, growth, safety, or news coverage identified online (2013-2026). No corporate web presence.
fit_notes: Sole-proprietor / tribal-area route operator at single-bus scale on the Laguna Pueblo. Too small to be a tuck-in for Summit; no demonstrable fleet, contracts, or succession story. Pass.

name: Kid Ridez Fleet LLC
districts_or_customers: Private/independent schools incl. Springside Chestnut Hill Academy, Salesianum, Padua Academy, Ursuline, Tower Hill, Wilmington Friends, Sanford School, Saint Edmonds Academy; also Brandywine School District; serves DE/PA/NJ tristate
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Founder-led growth story (mom of six expanded into multi-van children's transport service). BBB-listed; active LinkedIn/Facebook presence as of 2026.
fit_notes: Niche van-based private-school shuttle operator (not yellow-bus contractor) serving high-end Wilmington independent schools. Interesting bolt-on for Summit's DE footprint if Summit wants to extend into private-school/last-mile shuttle services, but micro-fleet scale (sub-$1M revenue) and van model make it more of an add-on than a standalone tuck-in.

name: Zonex School Shuttle SVC
districts_or_customers: None confirmed; not visible on Anchorage School District contractor lists. Anchorage ASD primarily uses First Student for yellow-bus contracts.
recent_news: No press, web presence, FMCSA carrier record, or news identified. Registered out of a residential address (7750 Eastbrook Dr) suggesting sole-proprietor side business.
fit_notes: Sub-scale, recently-formed (2022), single-vehicle, residential-address operator with no contract footprint. Not a viable Summit tuck-in. Pass.

name: M & A School Bus Trnsprtn LTD
districts_or_customers: None confirmed. Methuen-area school contracts dominated by NRT Bus (55 Hampshire Rd, Methuen) and similar regional players. Not appearing in Methuen Public Schools transportation contractor materials.
recent_news: Brand-new entity (2025 formation). No public web presence, no FMCSA carrier authority record surfaced, no news. Residential-address registration on Myona St.
fit_notes: Just-formed sole-proprietor with no demonstrated fleet, contracts, or scale in a market already served by NRT Bus and other MA incumbents. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate. Pass.

name: Midwest Family Bus Alliance
districts_or_customers: None confirmed; possibly West Central / Hartford-area route(s) for West Central School District 49-7 (unconfirmed). Hartford-area registered, rural SD farm-address (465th Ave).
recent_news: Registered as LLC in SD circa 2015 (per Argus-Leader business filings). No M&A, growth, or safety news. No corporate web presence.
fit_notes: Likely a 1-3 bus family route contractor in rural SD. SD school-bus market is highly fragmented family-operator landscape and not part of Summit's near-term consolidation geography. Sub-scale and too small to move the needle as a tuck-in. Pass.
